_fixture_note: Real output from 2026-07-16 against RAW.CLUSTER_TEST_WELL_ORGANIZED (15M rows, 2.2GB), physically sorted by REGION at creation (no explicit clustering key needed). 5 real queries filtering on REGION were run against it. First live firing of pruning_already_good: all 5 queries pruned well, and the skill correctly reported no action needed rather than manufacturing a finding.
heuristic_note: Candidate columns are found via text-matching real column names against the non-SELECT-list portion of poorly-pruned queries -- not a SQL parser. It can miss a real filter written unusually, and can't fully rule out a same-named column from a different, joined table.

advisory.detail: 5 qualifying queries analyzed, none scanned more than 50% of the table's partitions -- pruning already looks healthy, no clustering change indicated.
